title: Home Dashboard
summary: Spine core archetype: current glucose, system/reservoir/battery status, the hero overnight CGM graph with Luna delivery ticks, and the nightly insight card.

title: Settings
summary: Spine core archetype: account and care configuration list; Hypo Shield + IOB Display (default OFF), Devices, Support.

title: Session History
summary: Spine core archetype: date-range selector, in-range ring + total insulin delivered, per-night CGM graph, residual IOB at wake, and a session list.

title: Hardware Checkpoint
summary: Spine core archetype: informative hardware checkpoint with a moon-in-orbit detect; the CTA is never gated on connection state.

title: Dose Confirmation
summary: Spine core archetype: two-step safety-critical confirmation — acknowledge update-setting AND take-dose, then slide to confirm both.

title: Home — Default Tip
summary: Resting Hypo Shield tip: nightly basal looks well-matched. States the standing dose (chip opens TDBD detail); a reassurance line, not an accept control.

title: Home — Tip Post (recommendation)
summary: A basal recommendation is available — decision-support framing (14 U Increase). A suggestion only; the only action opens the two-step confirm. The read never accepts.

title: Learning State & Dosing Mode
summary: Pre-recommendation: Luna learns before suggesting — both 5 Luna sessions AND 7 days of wear. Dual progress + current Dosing Mode (Establishing baseline).

title: Mid-Session Dose Announcement
summary: Calm bedside hand-off over the dimmed live dashboard. Announcement only — review now or in the morning; current basal stays in place until confirmed.

title: Confirm Amount — Increase (two-part)
summary: Two-part action: acknowledge update-setting AND take-dose, then slide to confirm both. Slider disabled until both acknowledged. Dose value [X]/14 U is a placeholder.

title: Confirm Amount — Reset Required
summary: A manual basal change reset learning — no dose value and no slide. Re-learning progress (5 sessions AND 7 days); single action acknowledges the new baseline.

title: Confirm Skip (decline / defer)
summary: Decline/defer: nothing changes, current basal stands. Consequence shown in Plum (never red); the recommendation isn't lost — retrievable under Settings · Hypo Shield.

title: Settings — Hypo Shield
summary: Settings › Hypo Shield: always-on for the T1D pivotal (no participant toggle; T2D disable is a footnote). State, last recommendation + disposition, TDBD + learning.

title: TDBD Detail (current value, learning, history)
summary: Current programmed total daily basal (you set this — Luna never changes it), learning progress (5 AND 7, learned), and a plain change/recommendation history.

title: Push notification — prompt-to-open only
summary: Lock-screen push: prompt-to-open only — no dose value, no confirmable action on the lock screen. Tapping opens the in-app review + two-step confirm.

title: Home dashboard — IOB Display enabled
summary: Opted-in Home: the active-insulin (IOB) row appears (OFF by default). Decision-support only — 0.1 U, capital U, Luna-delivered insulin only; never instructs a dose.

title: Pre-session IOB announcement
summary: Insight card announcing IOB Display + the shared two-step component reused as an opt-in acknowledgement (NOT a dose action). Slide turns the display on.

title: Settings — IOB Display toggle (default OFF)
summary: Opt-in toggle, default OFF, with a plain-language explanation: Luna-delivered insulin only, avoid stacking, information not instruction.

title: Session History detail — residual Luna IOB
summary: Drilled-in session detail surfacing the residual Luna IOB after a session ends (0.1 U, capital U), shown so you can avoid stacking a manual dose.

title: Chapter 1 — What Luna is
summary: Frame-before-data: what Luna is and isn't, before any data collection. Required completion, no skip valve.

title: Chapter 2 — Tell Luna your routine (TDBD capture)
summary: Capture current TDBD as prescribed — plain data capture, NOT the two-step dose gesture. Mealtime/bolus isn't entered.

title: Chapter 3 — Pair Luna Capsule (BLE)
summary: Pair the Luna Capsule over Bluetooth (calm moon-in-orbit detect). Tonight panel 1 of 3. Continue never gated on BLE status.

title: Chapter 4 — Pair CGM (Dexcom G7)
summary: Pair the CGM (Dexcom G7). CGM status reads 'Recent reading OK'. Tonight panel 2 of 3.

title: Chapter 5 — Handoff to Apollo Training
summary: Clean handoff into Apollo Training (coordinator closeout). Tonight panel complete (3 of 3) → Start Luna Training.

title: Setup Landing (none / Luna complete / all)
summary: Setup landing across the three states; a selector flips the Tonight panel + primary CTA. Luna needs all three before the first night.

title: UI Walkthrough (1 of 5)
summary: Brief UI walkthrough that reads as one onboarding with Apollo (BR-B5); module-scoped dots; spotlighted night-view preview.

title: Tonight Panel — fill states across the arc
summary: Review aid: the recurring Tonight panel filling across States 0–3. Order locked: pair Luna → pair CGM → enter TDBD.

title: Setup App Walkthrough (1–5 + Done)
summary: Guided UI tour (5 stops + Done) reading as one continuous onboarding; module-scoped dots; spotlights the status strip first.

title: Session History Intro (first-run, 1–4)
summary: First-run education before any session is logged; spotlighted preview of a future session summary.

title: Long-acting insulin (plain capture)
summary: Plain capture of the current long-acting (basal) insulin dose — NOT the two-step gesture. Generic 'long-acting insulin' only.

title: Settings — Luna Controller (device management)
summary: Device management: state hero, device details, paired CGM ('Recent reading OK'), rename / forget controller.

title: Intro — first session setup
summary: Calm centered intro into Apollo Training (continuation of onboarding). 'Let's get you ready for tonight.'

title: Step 01 — Inventory
summary: Evening setup 1 of 7. Gather the rapid-acting pen, Single-Sleep Reservoir, and a charged Luna Capsule.

title: Step 02 — Open tray
summary: Evening setup 2 of 7. Lift the lid until it clicks. Auto-looping video; no 'Watch again'.

title: Step 03 — Fill reservoir
summary: Evening setup 3 of 7. Dial [X] units — dose value [X] is an OPEN flag (Eng/Clinical), rendered as a real token, never fabricated.

title: Step 04 — Remove label
summary: Evening setup 4 of 7. Peel the label fully away so the reservoir seats cleanly.

title: Step 05 — Attach capsule
summary: Evening setup 5 of 7. Snap the controller on; lift straight up to remove the adhesive liner.

title: Step 06 — Remove from base
summary: Evening setup 6 of 7. Lift the assembled device off its base; it's ready to apply.

title: Step 07 — Apply to body
summary: Evening setup 7 of 7. Apply it to your upper arm — press firmly for a few seconds.

title: Hardware checkpoint
summary: Informative checkpoint (moon-in-orbit detect). CGM = 'Recent reading OK'. CTA never gated. Carries the verify-before-body + error-states open flags.

title: Evening outro — personal video
summary: Personal 'Tonight' video. Auto-loops; no 'Watch again'. 'You're all set for tonight.'

title: Overnight handoff — Luna active
summary: Overnight pause checkpoint: Luna is active and watching; the session visibly pauses for the night. Nothing appears pending.

title: Morning start
summary: Next-morning re-entry into Morning training — a single clear way back in. (BR-B4 trigger mechanism BRD-undecided; this is the destination.)

title: Step 08 — Remove device
summary: Morning removal 1 of 3. Good morning — before your next meal, gently remove Luna from your body.

title: Step 09 — Detach reservoir
summary: Morning removal 2 of 3. Peel the tab, then press the release button. Informative checkpoint never gates Next.

title: Step 10 — Charge controller
summary: Morning removal 3 of 3. Set the controller on its charger, ready for tonight. Done.

title: Morning outro — personal video
summary: Personal 'week ahead' video. Auto-loops; no 'Watch again'. 'Nice work — your morning's complete.'

title: Complete
summary: Training complete — 'You're all set.' 10 steps done · 1 night logged.

title: Mid-session resume — clean step boundary
summary: Re-entry that lands at a clean step boundary (start of the morning module), never partway through a step (closes BR-B2).

title: Replay from Settings — Training Guide (BR-B6)
summary: Settings › Help › Training Guide. Replay any step or whole module after setup; nothing here changes the device.

title: Post-session Load states 1-4
summary: Deferred to the single Dark-UI re-skin sweep; legacy 2021 stand-in for now.

title: Default-from-notification / Default-return
summary: Deferred to the single Dark-UI re-skin sweep; legacy 2021 stand-in for now.
